symbols: flute — the breath of life channeled into melody, recalling the biblical motif of music as praise and the breath of God animating creation
orange shirt — warmth, vitality, and the vibrancy of youth
pink-magenta background — energy and radiance surrounding the musician
cap — everyday attire marking the figure as an ordinary youth, not a courtly performer
description: A young dark-skinned boy wearing an orange shirt and a green-olive cap plays a metal penny whistle or flute. He holds the instrument to his lips with both hands, fingers positioned over the holes. His expression is one of focused concentration and joy. The background is a vivid pink-magenta with vertical streaks of color. Strong blue-violet highlights model the contours of his face and hands against the warm tones of the shirt. The composition is a close half-length portrait.
